cycles.fix_applied: Extend hold_s from 300s to 600s (remove hardcoded cap)
cycles.notes: Hold window fix deployed. 11 new closes in 30min, all TIMEOUT (0% TP/SL). Issue: bands still too wide.

cycles.fix_applied: Tighten bands: TP 80→35bps, SL 50→40bps (cost-validated by learning-agent)
cycles.notes: Band tighten deployed. Hit WR goal (50%) but P&L negative due to SL 5bps wider than TP.

cycles.fix_applied: Regime lag guard: require EMA10>=EMA30 for BULL_TREND
cycles.notes: Lag guard suppressed legitimate trends → RANGING → inverted direction entries → WR 50%→0%. REVERTED.

cycles.fix_applied: Widen TP: 35→50bps (attempt to give winners more room)
cycles.notes: TP=50bps exceeds market reachability (18-20bps avg move) → 100% TIMEOUT → WR collapsed 50%→32%. REVERTED.

cycles.fix_applied: Symmetric SL: 40→35bps (match TP=35 for equal risk/reward)
cycles.notes: DB reset for clean metrics but dashboard cache stale. Reverted to known-good (TP=35, SL=40) pending deeper PF investigation.
